instructions: Each representative role executes its predefined scenarios end-to-end and records outcome + feedback. UAT is approved only when every scenario for every role reaches 'Pass' and blocking feedback is resolved (§404, §406 UAT approved).

scenarios.title: Answer an RFP requirement with cited evidence
steps: Submit an RFP functional requirement to CRIE
Receive a compliance determination with confidence
Verify every claim carries a citation to a knowledge unit
scenarios.expected: Compliance result returned with citations and confidence; no uncited claims.

scenarios.title: Bulk requirement set to proposal rows
steps: Review the generated rows for completeness
scenarios.expected: Deterministic row payload matches the §295 contract; all requirements addressed.

scenarios.title: Trace a determination to authority source
steps: Follow the citation to the originating document/page/section

scenarios.title: Review repository analytics dashboard
steps: Open the Administration repository analytics view
Confirm knowledge-unit counts and category distribution
scenarios.expected: admin.* views render in the BI tool with correct aggregates (R-17).

scenarios.title: Approve/reject a proposal package
steps: Apply review decision using configured thresholds
scenarios.expected: Review decision recorded; immutable audit entry appended (§230/0023).
